title: Emotional Arc Game
genericDescription: Shape emotion across beginning, middle, and end; use mechanics and pacing rather than exposition alone; test audience response.
specificDescription: Build a 5 to 10 minute game with a deliberate emotional arc. Include a beat map showing how mechanics, audio, visuals, and stakes change over time.
gradingRubric: 30 pts emotional pacing; 20 pts mechanic-theme connection; 20 pts complete arc; 15 pts beat map; 15 pts playtest response.
